identity_baseline_caveat: Published coordinates have identity transforms and therefore zero transform/cycle gaps by construction; use them only as an observable fit baseline.
claim_boundary: Descriptive finite-benchmark evidence for resolution robustness and failure diagnostics on unlabelled real meshes; no truth-referenced accuracy or coverage.
statistical_inference: No p-values or population confidence intervals computed.
